page.content: In Table 1, the metrics examined are Unadjusted OR (95% CI), R2, AUC, P value, and Adjusted ORa (95% CI) across five conditions: for CTX/CPII, the values are 0.72 (0.03, 16.66), 0.001, 0.52, 0.84, and 0.53 (0.02, 13.23); for C2C/CPII, the values are <0.001 (<0.001, 1.14), 0.04, 0.60, 0.05, and 0.001 (<0.001, 1.46); for C1,2C/CPII, the values are 0.24 (0.002, 39.12), 0.003, 0.52, 0.59, and 0.31 (0.002, 52.18); for C1,2C/C2C, the values are 0.19 (0.02, 2.12), 0.02, 0.57, 0.18, and 0.22 (0.02, 2.48); and for Col2CTX/Cr ratio/C2C, the values are 1.60 (0.31, 8.19), 0.003, 0.52, 0.57, and 1.37 (0.26, 7.40).

page.content: Table 2 presents data on cases 1 through 5 with the following specifics: Case 1, age 28, tumor size 3.5 × 2.2 cm2, LN N, subtype monophasic, treatment Excision + rad + chemo, outcome ATPM, survival 78 m; Case 2, age 41, tumor size 2.9 × 2.7 cm2, LN N, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome ANED, survival 57 m; Case 3, age 22, tumor size 4.0 × 3.1 cm2, LN 0/8, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome ANED, survival 53 m; Case 4, age 31, tumor size 5.2 × 4.9 cm2, LN 0/21, subtype biphasic, treatment Excision + rad + chemo, outcome DOR, survival 26 m; Case 5, age 37, tumor size 6.6 × 5.1 cm2, LN N, subtype monophasic, treatment Excision + rad, outcome DOPM, survival 37 m.
